From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Notodden** may refer to:

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notodden_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Places")]

* [Notodden](/wiki/Notodden "Notodden"), a municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden (town)](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"), a town within Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden Church](/wiki/Notodden_Church "Notodden Church"), a church in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden Airport](/wiki/Notodden_Airport "Notodden Airport"), a municipal regional airport in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden Old Station](/wiki/Notodden_Old_Station "Notodden Old Station"), a former railway station in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden New Station](/wiki/Notodden_New_Station "Notodden New Station"), a former railway station in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden Public Transport Terminal](/wiki/Notodden_Public_Transport_Terminal "Notodden Public Transport Terminal"), a railway and bus station in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway

## Sport

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notodden_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Sport")]

* [Notodden FK](/wiki/Notodden_FK "Notodden FK"), a Norwegian football club located in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
* [Notodden Stadion](/wiki/Notodden_Stadion "Notodden Stadion"), a sports stadium in Notodden municipality in Telemark county, Norway
